title: 84-U hunting rifle

The [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Arms]] '''84-U hunting rifle''' was a [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] produced around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. One 84-U [[Hunting blaster/Legends|hunting]] [[Rifle/Legends|rifle]] was dropped into the [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] pit of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt's]] [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|palace]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] prior to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], and the [[Yuzzum/Legends|Yuzzum]] [[Wam Lufba/Legends|Wam Lufba]] later utilized this rifle to escape from the pit after falling into it. Following his exit from the rancor pit, Lufba became the henchman of the [[Smuggler/Legends|gun-runner]] [[Pote Snitkin/Legends|Pote Snitkin]] and would continue to often carry the 84-U [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] rifle.

==Description==
The 84-U [[Hunting/Legends|hunting]] [[Blaster rifle/Legends|rifle]] was a model of [[Hunting blaster/Legends|hunting blaster]] that had a large [[Stock/Legends|stock]] and trigger, such that it could be held and operated by a [[Yuzzum/Legends|Yuzzum's]] large [[Limb/Legends|hands]] and fingers. The [[Color/Legends|black]] rifle had a long [[Barrel/Legends|barrel]] with a rotatable [[Scope/Legends|scope]] fixed halfway down the barrel's length. The [[Weapon/Legends|weapon]] also had a removable shoulder strap attached to the stock and the barrel in front of the scope.<ref name="db" />

==History==
[[File:WamLufba-PhotoMasher.png|thumb|left|200px|Wam Lufba with the rifle]]
A [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Arms]] product, the 84-U hunting [[Rifle/Legends|rifle]] was manufactured around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="db" /> Several [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="necdate">{{CSWECite|II|265|Lufba, Wam "Blam"}} notes that [[Wam Lufba/Legends|Wam Lufba]] was kidnapped from [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] several [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]</ref> on<ref name="db" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="nec">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], an 84-U rifle fell into the pit underneath the throne room of [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt's]] [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|palace]].<ref name="db" />

The rifle remained in the pit until Jabba had a [[Unidentified poacher|poacher]] and four of their [[Yuzzum/Legends|Yuzzum]] captives thrown into the pit to be [[Death/Legends|executed]] by the predatory [[Jabba's rancor/Legends|rancor]] that lived within. As the group was [[Foodstuff/Legends|devoured]], one of the Yuzzums, named [[Wam Lufba/Legends|Wam Lufba]], found the 84-U hunting rifle. Lufba took the rifle and fled into the [[Rancor/Legends|rancor's]] holding pen. The [[Gender/Legends|male]] Yuzzum killed three of Jabba's guards with the [[Weapon/Legends|weapon]], proving himself to be a great [[Sniper/Legends|marksman]].<ref name="db" />

[[Pote Snitkin/Legends|Pote Snitkin]], a [[Skrilling/Legends|Skrilling]] [[Smuggler/Legends|gun-runner]] in the employment of Jabba,<ref name="db2">{{DB|character|potesnitkin|Snitkin, Pote}}</ref> witnessed Lufba's marksmanship and, impressed by his skill, rescued Lufba from the pen. Following his escape, Lufba became Snitkin's henchman and was given the nickname "Blam" for his skill with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]. Lufba would often continue to carry the 84-U hunting rifle that had saved his life.<ref name="db" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:WamLufba-TheMakingOfReturnOfTheJedi.png|thumb|right|200px|The model of Lufba holding the rifle for ''Return of the Jedi'']]
The 84-U hunting rifle was created for the third film of the [[original trilogy]], [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']],<ref name="MakingROTJ">''[[The Making of Return of the Jedi]]''</ref> released in [[1983]].<ref name="Jedi">{{Film|VI}}</ref> The rifle was created as part of a sculpt of Lufba during the film's development by [[Nilo Rodis-Jamero]] and [[Judy Elkins]] in [[1981]]. Although the rifle was created in model form and as a prop for the film,<ref name="MakingROTJ" /> it did not appear in the film itself, with Lufba shown empty-handed in his Jabba's palace scenes.<ref name="Jedi" />

The rifle was not pictured until [[1998]] on Lufba's card for [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]] expansion [[Jabba's Palace Limited]].<ref name="CCG">{{CCG|set=Jabba's Palace Limited|cardname=Yuzzum}}</ref> The rifle would later be identified<ref name="db" /> in [[2005]] in the winning entry for Lufba, written by [[Tim Veekhoven]] under the alias "Sompeetalay," in the [[StarWars.com]] [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] contest [[What's The Story?]].<ref name="blog">{{Blog|teekay-421|13|They were the chosen ones}}</ref>

Veekhoven had been inspired to write about Lufba by ''[[From Star Wars to Jedi: The Making of a Saga]]'', a 1983 documentary, and linked the rifle to his story due to the discrepancy of such a weapon being wielded by a Yuzzum. The author also named the rifle due to feeling that there was a lack of official names for weapons featured in ''[[Star Wars]]'' films,<ref name="blog" /> including ''Return of the Jedi''.<ref name="Jedi" />
